storeError.actionFailed: Action failed, please try again later.
storeError.loadAuditFailed: Failed to load audit logs, please try again later.
storeError.loadPurchasesFailed: Failed to load purchases, please try again later.
storeError.loadOrderDetailFailed: Failed to load order details, please try again later.
storeError.loadDownloadsFailed: Failed to load download links, please try again later.
storeError.loadOrdersFailed: Failed to load orders, please try again later.
storeError.publishNeedVersion: Publish failed; the product needs a downloadable version first.

products.searchPlaceholder: Search work name, summary, or slug
products.emptyDesc: No works match the selected filters — try adjusting or resetting them.

stores.searchPlaceholder: Search store name, subdomain, or description
stores.emptyDesc: Stores appear here once you approve store applications.
stores.emptyFilteredDesc: Try adjusting your keywords or filters.
stores.suspendConfirm: Suspending pauses this store’s public operation. You can lift it any time. Suspend?
stores.closeConfirm: Closing permanently terminates this store and can’t be undone. Close?
stores.msgUnsuspended: Suspension lifted — the store is back in operation.

review.searchPlaceholder: Search store name, subdomain, or applicant email
review.emptyDesc: New store applications will appear here once submitted.
review.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Explain the rejection reason — it will be included in the notification email.
review.approveConfirm: Approving creates the store and assigns the applicant as Owner. Approve?
review.msgApproved: Application approved — the store has been created.

reviewHistory.searchPlaceholder: Search store name, subdomain, or email
reviewHistory.emptyDesc: Once you approve or reject applications, the records appear here.
reviewHistory.emptyFilteredDesc: Try adjusting your keywords or filters.

upload.titleSub: Clearly describe what buyers get; put the most eye-catching keywords first.
upload.titlePlaceholder: e.g. City Dawn · Minimalist architecture photo set, 40 shots
upload.tagsSub: Up to 5 — help buyers find you in the marketplace.
upload.blurbPlaceholder: Win buyers over in one line…
upload.uploadSub: Supports ZIP, PDF, JPG/PNG, WAV/MP3, PSD and more — up to 5 GB per file.
upload.dropzoneTitle: Drag files here, or click to choose
upload.dropzoneSub: Buyers can download these files after payment
upload.coverHueSub: Your thumbnail uses this hue to generate a gradient cover.
upload.confirmSub: Submitting creates and publishes the product; you can also save a draft to publish later.
upload.copyrightNote: You keep 100% of the copyright; the platform takes only a 3% transaction fee.
upload.previewNote: This is the card buyers see in the marketplace — it updates live as you edit.
upload.msgNeedFile: Please add at least one downloadable file.

openStore.withdrawConfirm: After withdrawing you can re-apply. Withdraw?
openStore.applyDesc: Enter a store name and subdomain. After you submit, the platform reviews it. Once approved, your store opens on your subdomain.
openStore.slugHint: 3–30 lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens; can’t start or end with a hyphen
openStore.msgSubmitted: Your application has been submitted — please wait for review.

storeSettings.appearanceDesc: Your banner and avatar appear on your store page. Click an image to replace it — JPG / PNG / GIF / WebP, up to 5 MB each.
storeSettings.infoDesc: Your store name and description are shown to buyers. The subdomain is set when you open the store and can’t be changed.
storeSettings.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell buyers about your store, style, and what makes it special…
storeSettings.msgInvalidType: Only JPG / PNG / GIF / WebP images are supported.

catalogCategories.childSub: Manage the subcategories under this top-level category
catalogCategories.rootSub: {count} platform categories, used for marketplace browsing and product classification
catalogCategories.emptyRootHint: After adding a top-level category, you can create subcategories.
catalogCategories.emptyChildHint: Add the first subcategory under this top-level category.
catalogCategories.deleteConfirm: Deletion can’t be undone; if subcategories or products still reference it, the backend will reject the deletion.
catalogCategories.slugHint: Only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens; must be unique platform-wide.
catalogCategories.valSlugInvalid: Slug must be 3–100 lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.
catalogCategories.msgActionFailed: Action failed, please try again later.
catalogCategories.msgDeleteBlocked: This category still has subcategories or product references and can’t be deleted.

auditLog.emptyDesc: No audit events match the filters — try adjusting or resetting them.

adminUsage.trafficNa:
StorageService doesn’t yet track download traffic or historical usage snapshots —
this section will be available once a metrics pipeline is built.

adminProducts.searchPlaceholder: Search product name, slug, or summary
adminProducts.emptyDesc: Products appear here once sellers publish work.
adminProducts.emptyFilteredDesc: Try adjusting your keywords or filters.

members.emptyDesc: Members appear here after they register.
members.emptyFilteredDesc: Try adjusting your keywords or filters.

adminOverview.title: Platform dashboard
adminOverview.sub: Platform transaction volume is up {delta}% from last month, with {count} store applications pending review.

purchases.subStats: {count} orders · click details to view products and download links
purchases.emptyDesc: No orders match the selected status — try adjusting or resetting the filter.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.sub: {count} works you’d love to own. We’ll let you know about price drops and new releases.
wishlist.emptyDesc: Tap the heart in the marketplace to save works you love here.

orders.emptyDesc: No orders match the filters — try adjusting or resetting them.

storeProducts.emptyTitle: This store has no products yet
storeProducts.emptyDesc: Products will appear here once the seller publishes work.
storeProducts.suspendConfirm: Suspending removes this product from the marketplace and blocks purchases. You can lift it any time. Suspend?
storeProducts.msgUnsuspended: Suspension lifted — the product is back to archived.

overview.sub: Revenue is up {delta}% from last month, with {count} works in review.

reviewList.empty: This work has no buyer reviews yet.

purchaseModal.title: Purchase details
purchaseModal.notCompleted: This order isn’t complete yet — you can download the content once payment is finished.
purchaseModal.noFiles: This product version has no downloadable files.

announcements.createDesc: Notify everyone following your store. Send now or schedule for later.
announcements.fieldMessagePlaceholder: What do you want to tell your followers…
announcements.fieldScheduledAtHint: Pick a future time to schedule; leave empty to notify followers immediately.
announcements.cancelConfirmDesc: "{title}" has not been sent yet. Cancelling will skip notifying followers.
announcements.emptyDesc: Post your first announcement to keep followers in the loop.
announcements.msgCreated: Announcement sent — followers will be notified shortly
announcements.msgScheduledInPast: Scheduled time must be in the future

legalDocs.emptyDesc: Click "New draft" to create the first version
legalDocs.contentPlaceholder: Lines starting with "## " are section headings, "- " are list items, others are paragraphs
legalDocs.contentHint: "## " = section heading (auto numbered), "- " = list item; once activated a version becomes immutable — create a new draft instead
legalDocs.activateConfirm: Activating publishes this version and deactivates the current one of the same type; existing members must re-consent at sign-in. Continue?
legalDocs.deactivateConfirm: After deactivation there will be no active version to display. Continue?
legalDocs.msgLoadFailed: Failed to load, please try again later
legalDocs.msgActionFailed: Action failed, please try again later
